hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】市场预计沃什美联储将比预期更加鹰派；【WORLD】伊朗歌手因不戴头巾表演而被判处 74 鞭刑；【CRYPTO】美国参议院通过住房法案，对美联储 CBDC 实施四年禁令。

items.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
items.summary: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's tough talk on inflation Wednesday reverberated through financial markets.
items.title_zh: 市场预计沃什美联储将比预期更加鹰派
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什周三关于通胀的强硬言论在金融市场引起反响。

items.title: Iranian Singer Sentenced to 74 Lashes for Performing Without Hijab
items.summary: Parastoo Ahmadi and her band will also be barred from leaving the country or performing for two years, dampening hopes for a more moderate postwar regime in Iran.
items.title_zh: 伊朗歌手因不戴头巾表演而被判处 74 鞭刑
items.summary_zh: 帕拉斯托·艾哈迈迪和她的乐队也将被禁止离开该国或在两年内演出，这浇灭了伊朗战后政权更加温和的希望。

items.title: U.S. Senate passes housing bill that carries four-year ban on a Fed CBDC
items.summary: The idea of a U.S. central bank digital currency — though little more than a research topic at the Federal Reserve — may be getting formally blocked.
items.title_zh: 美国参议院通过住房法案，对美联储 CBDC 实施四年禁令
items.summary_zh: 美国央行数字货币的想法——尽管只不过是美联储的一个研究课题——可能会被正式阻止。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
items.summary: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.
items.title_zh: “政权更迭，但戴着丝绒手套”：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
items.summary_zh: 第一个宣布的重大变化预示着一场悄然的革命，成立了特别工作组来重新思考美联储所做的几乎所有事情。

items.title: Live updates: An 'altcoin season' signal flashed, but bitcoin's slide is what set it off
items.summary: After nearly two years of declines, alts have run out of sellers and steadied, while bitcoin has dropped hard, sliding back toward $63,600.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：“山寨币季节”信号闪现，但比特币的下滑才是引发这一信号的原因
items.summary_zh: 经过近两年的下跌后，山寨币的卖家已经耗尽并趋于稳定，而比特币则大幅下跌，回落至 63,600 美元。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其在现实世界的部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
items.summary: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
items.title_zh: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
items.summary_zh: 艾伦·格林斯潘 (Alan Greenspan) 在四位总统的领导下执掌美联储 19 年，并掌握了被称为 Fedspeak 的混淆艺术。

items.title: U.S. and Iran begin peace talks amid conflicting claims over Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Iran's military said it had closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to continued Israeli military strikes in Lebanon; the U.S. said it remains open.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡主权争议中开始和平谈判
items.summary_zh: 伊朗军方表示，已关闭霍尔木兹海峡，以回应以色列对黎巴嫩的持续军事打击；美国表示仍保持开放。

items.title: The riskiest SpaceX stock trade of all had a big first week
items.summary: SpaceX's IPO did not just mint the biggest debut in market history and a trillionaire, but it also triggered a historic land grab in risky leveraged ETFs.
items.title_zh: 风险最高的 SpaceX 股票交易首周表现强劲
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 的 IPO 不仅创造了市场历史上最大的首次公开募股和万亿富翁，而且还引发了风险杠杆 ETF 的历史性抢滩。

items.title: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
items.summary: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯军队集结威胁被视为夺取乌克兰顿巴斯关键的城市
items.summary_zh: 如果科斯特扬季尼夫卡陷落，俄罗斯军队将能够向乌克兰东部仅存的最后据点推进。

items.title: Tesla crash that killed a woman under US federal investigation
items.summary: A Tesla driver on Friday said he was using ‘self-driving’ technology after his vehicle sped into a Texas home.
items.title_zh: 造成一名女性死亡的特​​斯拉事故正在接受美国联邦调查
items.summary_zh: 周五，一名特斯拉司机表示，在他的车辆冲进德克萨斯州的一户人家后，他正在使用“自动驾驶”技术。

items.title: How Mark Rutte of NATO Manages an Unpredictable Trump
items.summary: Secretary General Mark Rutte is headed to Washington. His style has at times frustrated the very European leaders who need him to hold the alliance together.
items.title_zh: 北约的马克·鲁特如何应对不可预测的特朗普
items.summary_zh: 秘书长马克·吕特将前往华盛顿。他的风格有时会让那些需要他来维持联盟的欧洲领导人感到沮丧。

items.title: Ripple targets EU, wins preliminary MiCA approval from Luxembourg financial regulator
items.summary: The license will enable Ripple to offer its stablecoin payment systems to European companies and expand into broader crypto functions.
items.title_zh: Ripple瞄准欧盟，获得卢森堡金融监管机构MiCA初步批准
items.summary_zh: 该许可证将使 Ripple 能够向欧洲公司提供其稳定币支付系统，并扩展到更广泛的加密功能。

items.title: XRP drifts toward $1.10 support as traders await break from three-week range
items.summary: Weak volume and fading momentum kept XRP pinned near the bottom of its recent range, with the $1.05-$1.10 area emerging as the market's key line in the sand.
items.title_zh: 由于交易者等待突破三周区间，XRP 向 1.10 美元支撑位漂移
items.summary_zh: 成交量疲软和动能减弱使 XRP 保持在近期区间底部附近，其中 1.05 美元至 1.10 美元区域成为市场的关键线。

items.title: Trump signs orders to build a quantum computer and protect against the one that could break encryption
items.summary: The White House issued twin executive orders to accelerate U.S. development of large-scale quantum computers while simultaneously hardening defenses against such machines.
items.title_zh: 特朗普签署命令建造一台量子计算机并防止可能破解加密的计算机
items.summary_zh: 白宫发布了两项行政命令，以加速美国大规模量子计算机的开发，同时加强对此类机器的防御。

items.title: US Senate passes housing supply bill featuring CBDC ban in 85-5 vote
items.summary: The housing supply bill seeks to ban the issuance of a CBDC or any similar digital asset until the end of 2030.
items.title_zh: 美国参议院以 85 比 5 的投票结果通过了禁止 CBDC 的住房供应法案
items.summary_zh: 住房供应法案旨在禁止在 2030 年底之前发行 CBDC 或任何类似的数字资产。

items.title: Trump signs executive orders setting 2031 deadline for post-quantum migration
items.summary: One order mandated that all federal high-value assets and systems transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography by the end of 2031.
items.title_zh: 特朗普签署行政命令，设定 2031 年后量子移民的最后期限
items.summary_zh: 一项命令要求所有联邦高价值资产和系统在 2031 年底前过渡到后量子密码学。

items.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
items.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.
items.title_zh: Omio 如何打造对话式旅行的未来
items.summary_zh: 了解 Omio 如何使用 OpenAI 来增强对话式旅行体验、加速产品开发并转型为一家 AI 原生公司。

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
items.title_zh: 使用人工智能帮助医生诊断影响儿童的罕见遗传病
items.summary_zh: 研究人员使用 OpenAI 推理模型来帮助诊断罕见疾病，在之前未解决的病例中识别出了 18 种新的诊断结果。

items.title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
items.title_zh: 从 Hugging Face Hub 到 Strands Agents 和 LeRobot 的机器人硬件

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
items.summary: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 表示，比特币的未来将像智能手机一样具有革命性
items.summary_zh: CoinDesk 的指数和数据总裁向投资者传达了一条信息：不要指望比特币。

items.title: Crypto market drops as Nasdaq tech selloff spills into digital assets
items.summary: Bitcoin lost 2.5% to $62,300 and ether fell more than 4% while $717 million in liquidations amplified losses across altcoins.
items.title_zh: 随着纳斯达克科技股抛售蔓延至数字资产，加密货币市场下跌
items.summary_zh: 比特币下跌 2.5%，至 62,300 美元，以太币下跌超过 4%，而 7.17 亿美元的清算放大了山寨币的损失。

items.title: Hut 8 to pay $2.35 million to settle investor suit over U.S. Bitcoin merger
items.summary: The former bitcoin miner denied any wrongdoing related to its 2023 merger with U.S. Bitcoin Corp.
items.title_zh: Hut 8 支付 235 万美元和解投资者就美国比特币合并提起的诉讼
items.summary_zh: 这家前比特币矿商否认其 2023 年与美国比特币公司合并有任何不当行为。

items.title: Bitcoin price has limited downside, likely near bottom, contrarian indicator suggests
items.summary: The bitcoin price's long-term moving averages are set to flash a bearish signal soon. That's good news for the bulls.
items.title_zh: 反向指标显示，比特币价格下行空间有限，可能接近底部
items.summary_zh: 比特币价格的长期移动平均线很快就会发出看跌信号。这对公牛来说是个好消息。

items.title: SpaceX’s $600 billion plunge erased equivalent of nearly half of bitcoin’s market cap in 3 days
items.summary: The newly public company shed close to half of bitcoin's entire market value in three sessions after announcing its first bond sale. Bitcoin, absorbing the same backdrop, fell less than 1%.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 暴跌 6000 亿美元，三天内相当于比特币市值蒸发近一半
items.summary_zh: 这家新上市的公司在宣布首次发行债券后，在三个交易日内蒸发了近一半的比特币总市值。比特币在同样的背景下下跌了不到 1%。

items.title: Bitcoin falls under $63,000 as a tech selloff drags risk assets lower
items.summary: A rotation out of this year's best AI and chip stocks sank Asian markets, with South Korea's Kospi down 6%, and crypto fell with them. Bitcoin is down more than 3% on the week.
items.title_zh: 科技股抛售拖累风险资产走低，比特币跌破 63,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 今年最佳人工智能和芯片股的轮换导致亚洲市场下跌，韩国 Kospi 股价下跌 6%，加密货币也随之下跌。比特币本周下跌超过 3%。

items.title: Hut 8 agrees to $2.35 million settlement in investor suit tied to US Bitcoin merger
items.summary: Hut 8 agreed to pay $2.35M to settle a securities class action over disclosure claims from its 2023 merger with U.S. Bitcoin Corp.
items.title_zh: Hut 8 同意以 235 万美元和解解决与美国比特币合并有关的投资者诉讼
items.summary_zh: Hut 8 同意支付 235 万美元，以和解因 2023 年与美国比特币公司合并而引发的披露索赔的证券集体诉讼。

items.title: David Bailey’s Nakamoto closes legacy healthcare clinics as bitcoin operating company pivot nears completion
items.summary: Nakamoto closed its healthcare clinics on June 19, completing a merger-linked wind-down as it pivots fully to bitcoin operations.
items.title_zh: 随着比特币运营公司的转型接近完成，大卫贝利的中本聪关闭了传统的医疗诊所
items.summary_zh: 中本聪于 6 月 19 日关闭了其医疗诊所，完成了与合并相关的业务缩减，并全面转向比特币业务。

items.title: Bitmine, SharpLink and Joe Lubin back Ethlabs nonprofit to advance Ethereum’s ‘next phase’ of growth
items.summary: Ethlabs, backed by Joe Lubin and the two largest ETH DATs, Bitmine and SharpLink, will focus on institutional adoption.
items.title_zh: Bitmine、SharpLink 和 Joe Lubin 支持 Ethlabs 非营利组织，以推动以太坊的“下一阶段”增长
items.summary_zh: Ethlabs 在 Joe Lubin 和两个最大的 ETH DAT Bitmine 和 SharpLink 的支持下，将专注于机构采用。

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
items.title_zh: 新的使用情况分析和更新的企业支出控制
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 为 ChatGPT Enterprise 引入了新的支出控制和使用分析，帮助组织充满信心地管理成本并扩展 AI。

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
items.title_zh: 近乎自主的人工智能化学家改善了药物化学中具有挑战性的反应
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Molecule.one 展示了一位近乎自主的 AI 化学家如何使用 GPT-5.4 改进关键的制药反应，从而推进药物化学研究。

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
items.title_zh: LifeSciBench 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 LifeSciBench，这是一个由专家撰写、专家评审的基准，用于评估人工智能系统如何处理现实世界的生命科学研究任务和决策。

items.title: We got local models to triage the OpenClaw repo for FREE!*
items.title_zh: 我们有本地模型免费对 OpenClaw 存储库进行分类！*

items.title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
items.title_zh: MosaicLeaks：你的研究代理人能保守秘密吗？

items.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
items.title_zh: 是否足够代理？在您自己的工具上对开放模型进行基准测试

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: U.S. fights with Brazil for China's giant soybean market
items.summary: The U.S. Soybean Export Council makes claims to higher quality a selling point over Brazil's crop, as American farmers attempt to win back business from the world's largest importer
items.title_zh: 美国与巴西争夺中国巨大大豆市场
items.summary_zh: 美国大豆出口委员会声称更高质量是巴西作物的卖点，因为美国农民试图从世界最大进口国手中夺回业务

items.title: China's 618 shopping festival growth slows sharply as consumer spending malaise persists
items.summary: The latest consumer data reinforce how consumption in China remains subdued.
items.title_zh: 消费者支出持续低迷，中国618购物节增速大幅放缓
items.summary_zh: 最新的消费者数据凸显了中国的消费依然低迷。

items.title: Can anyone join Musk in the trillionaire club? Zuckerberg has best shot, according to prediction markets
items.summary: The Meta CEO is seen as next to join the Tesla and SpaceX CEO. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is seen as the second-most-likely.
items.title_zh: 有人能加入马斯克的万亿富翁俱乐部吗？根据预测市场，扎克伯格是最好的选择
items.summary_zh: Meta 首席执行官被认为是继特斯拉和 SpaceX 首席执行官之后的下一位首席执行官。英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋被认为是第二个最有可能的人。

items.title: The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
items.summary: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股后的平均买家在经历了两天的下滑后几乎陷入困境
items.summary_zh: 周四，SpaceX 股价下跌 7%，至 178 美元，该股交易价格大致与其略低于 180 美元的成交量加权平均价格一致。

items.title: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
items.summary: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.
items.title_zh: 万斯表示将邀请检查员回来后，伊朗表示没有对核设施做出新的承诺
items.summary_zh: 伊朗外交部表示，在瑞士会谈后，伊朗“没有就核检查做出新的承诺”。

items.title: Trump anticipates better relationship with Colombia under new leader
items.summary: Abelardo de la Espriella, who preliminary results suggest is Colombia's next president, had Trump's endorsement.
items.title_zh: 特朗普预计新领导人领导下与哥伦比亚关系会更好
items.summary_zh: 初步结果显示，阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉将成为哥伦比亚下一任总统，他得到了特朗普的支持。

items.title: Ransom note claims Nancy Guthrie died after abduction
items.summary: The note from the possible kidnappers reportedly stated that they did not mean for her to die and included an apology to the family.
items.title_zh: 勒索信声称南希·格思里在绑架后死亡
items.summary_zh: 据报道，可能的绑架者在信中表示，他们并不是故意要她死，并向家人道歉。

items.title: Montreal shooting leaves officer, civilian and suspect dead
items.summary: It was the first time in 24 years that a Montreal police officer was killed in the line of duty, the city's police chief said.
items.title_zh: 蒙特利尔枪击事件造成警官、平民和嫌疑人死亡
items.summary_zh: 蒙特利尔市警察局长表示，这是 24 年来首次有一名警察在执行任务时被杀。

items.title: Inquiry ordered after building fire kills 15 in north India city
items.summary: Witnesses described people jumping from windows to escape, while rescue teams broke through a wall to save lives.
items.title_zh: 印度北部城市建筑起火造成15人死亡后下令进行调查
items.summary_zh: 目击者称，人们从窗户跳下逃生，而救援队则冲破墙壁拯救生命。

items.title: Dettol apologises after ad to clean up 'toxic men' backfires in China
items.summary: The ad sparked accusations of sexism in China, after featuring a man looking for a partner who is "not tainted by other men".
items.title_zh: 滴露清理“毒男”广告在中国适得其反后道歉
items.summary_zh: 这则广告在中国引发了性别歧视的指责，广告中一名男子正在寻找“不受其他男人玷污”的伴侣。

items.title: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
items.summary: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.
items.title_zh: 联合国称缅甸军队在六个月内杀害了700多名平民
items.summary_zh: 联合国新报告称，去年六个月内有 702 名平民死亡，其中包括 153 名儿童。

items.title: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion
items.summary: The city's main liquified natural gas (LNG) processing site suffered a "technical accident" in the Ras Laffan industrial zone.
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔天然气爆炸至少13人死亡、数十人受伤
items.summary_zh: 该市主要液化天然气（LNG）加工基地位于拉斯拉凡工业区遭遇“技术事故”。

items.title: ‘A Terrible Inheritance’: Could Andy Burnham Succeed Where Starmer Failed?
items.summary: The likely successor to Prime Minister Keir Starmer will inherit the same challenges of economic stagnation and ascendant populism. Will a divided nation be prepared to give him time?
items.title_zh: “可怕的继承”：安迪·伯纳姆能否在斯塔默失败的地方取得成功？
items.summary_zh: 总理基尔·斯塔默的可能继任者将面临经济停滞和民粹主义抬头的同样挑战。一个分裂的国家愿意给他时间吗？

items.title: Iran Makes Moves to Assert Control Over the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: After Iran weaponized the waterway by making it too dangerous for businesses, experts say, the country is now looking to charge fees to vessels seeking to transit the vital water.
items.title_zh: 伊朗采取行动控制霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 专家表示，伊朗将这条水道武器化，使其对企业来说过于危险，现在该国正寻求向寻求运输重要水源的船只收取费用。

items.title: Soldier, Scholar and Symbol: Marc Bloch Is Elevated to France’s Panthéon
items.summary: French politicians, including those on the far right, are embracing a Jewish Resistance fighter murdered by the Gestapo in 1944.
items.title_zh: 士兵、学者和象征：马克·布洛赫 (Marc Bloch) 被晋升为法国先贤祠
items.summary_zh: 包括极右翼在内的法国政界人士正在拥抱 1944 年被盖世太保杀害的犹太抵抗运动战士。

items.title: Those British Strawberries Are Being Picked by Central Asian Workers
items.summary: Ten years after Brexit, most seasonal workers in Britain are from countries such as Kyrgyzstan and Tajikistan. Without them, agricultural chiefs say, many farms would fail.
items.title_zh: 那些英国草莓正在被中亚工人采摘
items.summary_zh: 英国脱欧十年后，英国的大多数季节性工人来自吉尔吉斯斯坦和塔吉克斯坦等国家。农业负责人表示，如果没有它们，许多农场就会倒闭。

items.title: Delcy Rodríguez, Venezuela’s President, Struggles to Uphold Trump’s Narrative of Success
items.summary: President Trump says Venezuela, under U.S. oversight, has “never made the money” it is making now. But new oil revenue isn’t helping ordinary Venezuelans, and anger seems to be mounting.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉总统德尔西·罗德里格斯努力维护特朗普的成功叙事
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，在美国的监督下，委内瑞拉“从未赚到过现在赚到的钱”。但新的石油收入并没有帮助普通委内瑞拉人，人们的愤怒似乎正在加剧。

items.title: At World Cup Soccer Game, Palestinian Emblems Abound
items.summary: Jordan’s first qualification for the World Cup also means a World Cup berth for Palestinians, millions of whom live in the country.
items.title_zh: 世界杯足球赛上，巴勒斯坦标志随处可见
items.summary_zh: 约旦首次获得世界杯参赛资格也意味着巴勒斯坦人获得了世界杯席位，该国有数百万人居住。

items.title: Keir Starmer Resigns as UK Prime Minister
items.summary: His departure in the coming weeks clears a path for Andy Burnham, a popular Labour Party mayor, to become the country’s seventh prime minister in a decade.
items.title_zh: 凯尔·斯塔默辞去英国首相职务
items.summary_zh: 他在未来几周的离职为受欢迎的工党市长安迪·伯纳姆（Andy Burnham）成为十年来第七任总理扫清了道路。

items.title: Cuba’s Fuel Crisis Brings Schools to a Standstill
items.summary: The country’s already-struggling schools are ending the academic year early because of a crippling fuel shortage caused by the U.S. oil blockade.
items.title_zh: 古巴的燃料危机导致学校停顿
items.summary_zh: 由于美国石油封锁造成严重的燃料短缺，该国本已陷入困境的学校将提前结束学年。

items.title: Ark Invest buys $32 million worth of SpaceX shares as stock plunges 16%
items.summary: SPCX fell 16.43% to close at $154.60 on Monday, erasing most of the gains recorded since its June 12 debut.
items.title_zh: Ark Invest 买入价值 3200 万美元的 SpaceX 股票，股价暴跌 16%
items.summary_zh: SPCX 周一下跌 16.43%，收于 154.60 美元，抹去了自 6 月 12 日首次亮相以来的大部分涨幅。

items.title: TurboFlow, aiming to be the ‘Kalshi of APAC,’ raises $6 million seed led by Pantera Capital
items.summary: The platform offers prediction markets and perpetual futures and aims to be a localized alternative to Kalshi and Polymarket for Asian users.
items.title_zh: TurboFlow 立志成为“亚太地区的 Kalshi”，筹集了由 Pantera Capital 领投的 600 万美元种子资金
items.summary_zh: 该平台提供预测市场和永续期货，旨在成为亚洲用户的 Kalshi 和 Polymarket 的本地化替代品。

items.title: Solana treasury firm Solmate’s largest stakeholder sues board for self-dealing, fiduciary breaches
items.summary: Board members Ron Sade and Keren Maimon personally bought about 2.298 million SLMT shares at $4.97, diluting shareholders ~20%.
items.title_zh: Solana 财务公司 Solmate 的最大利益相关者起诉董事会，指控其自我交易和信托违规
items.summary_zh: 董事会成员 Ron Sade 和 Keren Maimon 个人以 4.97 美元的价格购买了约 229.8 万股 SLMT 股票，稀释股东约 20%。

items.title: MoonPay expands into back-office financial operations with AI accounting startup Entendre acquisition
items.summary: MoonPay has made at least four other acquisitions this year as it works to expand via MoonPay Trade and MoonPay Institutional.
items.title_zh: MoonPay 收购人工智能会计初创公司 Entender，进军后台财务运营
items.summary_zh: MoonPay 今年至少进行了四次其他收购，致力于通过 MoonPay Trade 和 MoonPayInstitutional 进行扩张。

items.title: Securitize asks court to reject tZERO’s ‘meritless’ tokenization patent allegations
items.summary: Securitize alleged that tZERO's actions are "nothing more than the culmination" of shareholder pressure to capitalize on the patents.
items.title_zh: Securitize 请求法院驳回 tZERO 的“毫无根据”的代币化专利指控
items.summary_zh: Securitize 声称 tZERO 的行为“只不过是股东利用这些专利施加压力的结果”。

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
items.title_zh: Daybreak：保护世界上每个组织的工具
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了新的 Daybreak 工具，包括 Codex Security 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​，以帮助组织大规模查找、验证和修补漏洞。

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.
items.title_zh: 修补地球：支持开源维护者的黎明计划
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 Patch the Planet，这是一项 Daybreak 计划，可帮助开源维护人员通过人工智能和专家评审来查找、验证和修复漏洞。

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
items.summary: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.
items.title_zh: Codex-maxxing 适用于长时间运行的工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 Jason Liu 如何使用 Codex 保存上下文、管理复杂项目以及帮助工作在单一提示之外继续进行。

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.
items.title_zh: 三星电子为员工带来 ChatGPT 和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 三星电子向全球员工部署 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex，这标志着 OpenAI 最大的企业人工智能部署之一。

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.
items.title_zh: 提高 ChatGPT 中的健康智能
items.summary_zh: 了解 GPT-5.5 Instant 如何通过更强的推理、更好的背景、更清晰的沟通和医生知情的评估来改善 ChatGPT 的健康和保健反应。

items.title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
items.title_zh: 每周通过 AI、开放工具和人员参与交付 Huggingface_hub

items.title: PP-OCRv6 on Hugging Face: 50-Language OCR from 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters
items.title_zh: Hushing Face 上的 PP-OCRv6：从 1.5M 到 34.5M 参数的 50 种语言 OCR

items.title_zh: 超越LoRA：你能打败最流行的微调技术吗？

items.title_zh: GLM-5.2：专为长期任务而设计

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.summary: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.

items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.summary: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.

items.title: MIT in the media: For the future of tech, "Massachusetts can absolutely lead"
items.summary: Leaders, faculty across MIT discuss fostering innovation and talent in Greater Boston in special series of articles published alongside the outlet's annual list of 'Tech Power Players'

items.title: Could AI tell you where you left your keys?
items.summary: A new spatial memory system for robots efficiently captures details about the objects they see while exploring their environment.

items.summary_zh: 一种新的机器人空间记忆系统可以有效地捕捉它们在探索环境时看到的物体的细节。

items.title: MIT affiliates win 2026 Hertz Foundation Fellowships
items.summary: The fellowships in applied sciences, engineering, and mathematics recognize doctoral students who are pursuing solutions to the most pressing challenges in science and technology.
